name: MEG Energy Corp.
description: MEG Energy Corp. is a Canadian energy company focused on sustainable in situ thermal oil production in the southern Athabasca oil sands region of Alberta. The company specializes in utilizing Steam-Assisted Gravity Drainage (SAGD) technology to extract bitumen from oil sands deposits. MEG Energy operates key projects such as the Christina Lake facility, focusing on efficient and responsible resource development. The company transports and markets its thermal oil products to customers across North America and international markets, maintaining a commitment to innovation and environmental responsibility within the oil and gas sector.
